capabilities.name: Natural Chat (Cloud)
capabilities.description: Chat with Gemini via Open WebUI for complex reasoning

capabilities.name: Natural Chat (Local)
capabilities.description: Chat with adwi:latest (Qwen3 MoE 30.5B, 131K ctx) fully offline with streaming

capabilities.name: Cloud Reasoning
capabilities.description: Force Gemini cloud for complex multi-step reasoning tasks

capabilities.name: Plan Review
capabilities.description: Ask Gemini to review and critique a proposed plan or idea

capabilities.name: Image Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze an image using Gemini vision via Open WebUI. Extracts text, describes content, suggests actions.

capabilities.name: YouTube Summarize
capabilities.description: Summarize a YouTube video using captions. Auto-detected when you paste a YouTube URL.

capabilities.name: YouTube Save to Knowledge
capabilities.description: Summarize and save a YouTube video to notes and Open WebUI Knowledge

capabilities.name: URL Summarize
capabilities.description: Fetch and summarize a webpage using adwi local model

capabilities.name: File Search
capabilities.description: Search text in all approved workspace files

capabilities.name: File Read
capabilities.description: Read the first 400 lines of an allowed file

capabilities.name: Stack Status
capabilities.description: Check health of Ollama, Docker, Open WebUI, n8n, SearXNG, Safe Command API

capabilities.name: Self Heal
capabilities.description: Safe automatic repair: restarts Ollama, Docker stack, Command API, refreshes notes

capabilities.name: Knowledge Sync
capabilities.description: Sync files from open-webui-knowledge-upload folder into Open WebUI Knowledge base

capabilities.name: Daily Improve
capabilities.description: Daily improvement routine: status check, review logs, analyze failures, suggest upgrades, update journal, sync knowledge

capabilities.name: What Should I Build Next
capabilities.command: /what-next  or  what should I build next
capabilities.description: Review capability roadmap, recent logs, and suggest next improvements

capabilities.name: Capability Registry
capabilities.description: List all Adwi capabilities with status and risk levels

capabilities.name: Add Capability Plan
capabilities.description: Plan a new capability: Adwi will evaluate, propose implementation steps, and add to roadmap

capabilities.name: Model Status
capabilities.description: Show current model routing (cloud vs local, which model)

capabilities.name: Watcher Status
capabilities.description: Check if Open WebUI Knowledge auto-watcher is running

capabilities.name: Research Operator
capabilities.description: Deep multi-source research (SearXNG + Exa/Tavily/Firecrawl optional). Produces a cited brief saved to notes/research/. /research-save also appends to Obsidian daily note.

capabilities.name: Browser Delegate
capabilities.description: Safe browser agent using Playwright. Stops and asks confirmation before any account-changing, form-submit, payment, or delete action. Dry-run mode shows what it would do without acting. Saves results to notes/browser-tasks/.

capabilities.name: Daily Brief
capabilities.description: Proactive daily assistant brief: service status, Gmail inbox snapshot, today's priorities, a learning suggestion, and one setup improvement. Saves to notes/daily-briefs/ and Obsidian daily note. Callable from n8n.

capabilities.name: Tech Radar
capabilities.description: Scans 6 AI/dev technology areas (OpenAI Agents, MCP, Ollama, browser agents, LangGraph, local voice/vision/RAG). Categorises each as try-now / watch / ignore with reasoning. Saves to notes/tech-radar/.

capabilities.name: Memory Curator
capabilities.description: Reviews recent action logs and proposes 3-5 durable personal memories (preferences, project facts, patterns). Each proposal requires explicit Y/N confirmation before storage. Never auto-stores.

capabilities.name: Assistant Upgrade Status
capabilities.description: Shows all 5 Upgrade Pack commands, which optional API keys are configured, and where output is saved.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Capture
capabilities.description: Append a timestamped entry to the matching section of today's daily note. Types: focus, decision, idea, task, bug, fix, approval, note. idea → also logs to knowledge/Ideas Index.md. approval → also logs to knowledge/Pending Approval.md. Works offline (direct vault write).

capabilities.name: Obsidian Review
capabilities.description: Print a read-only review of captured items from the last N daily notes (default 7). Groups entries by section: Focus/Tasks, Decisions, Ideas, Bugs/Fixes, Pending Approval, Notes.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Review Save
capabilities.description: Generate and save a weekly review note to obsidian-vault/reviews/YYYY-MM-DD-weekly-review.md. Re-running on the same day updates the ADWI:REVIEW-CONTENT block in-place.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Promote Idea
capabilities.description: Create a structured idea note at obsidian-vault/projects/ideas/<Title>.md and link it in knowledge/Ideas Index.md. If the note already exists, appends a Captured Updates entry.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Plan
capabilities.description: Generate or update today's ADWI:DAILY-PLAN marker block from last N days of captures (default 7). Deterministic — no LLM. Sections: Top Focus, Carryover Tasks, Decisions, Ideas, Bugs/Fixes, Pending Approval.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Plan Clear
capabilities.description: Clear (blank) the ADWI:DAILY-PLAN block in today's daily note. Manual sections and other generated blocks are preserved.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Status
capabilities.description: Print vault summary: path, daily note count, today's note/plan status, latest review, .obsidian presence.

capabilities.name: Obsidian Validate
capabilities.description: Run vault health check: structure, template files, .obsidian config, volatile file tracking, marker hygiene. Also runnable as: python3 adwi/scripts/validate_obsidian_vault.py

capabilities.name: Obsidian Help
capabilities.description: Print Obsidian command cheat sheet: all obsidian commands with one-line descriptions and a link to the Operator Guide.
